member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Consts.ElementsItemGroup
member.summary: Constants for ItemGroup elements in project files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Consts.ElementsItemGroup.ProjectReference
member.summary: Project reference element name.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Consts.ElementsItemGroup.Reference
member.summary: Reference element name.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects
member.summary: Provides methods for changing target framework monikers in .csproj project files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.start
member.summary: Opening XML tag for TargetFramework element in csproj files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.end
member.summary: Closing XML tag for TargetFramework element in csproj files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.netstandard20
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET Standard 2.0.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.net48
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET Framework 4.8.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.net60
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET 6.0.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.net70Windows
member.summary: Na mém PC bude mít vše net7.0-windows Bylo by to velmi náročné dělat průběžné změny mezi net7.0 argument net7.0-windows

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.netstandard21
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET Standard 2.1.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.net5Uap
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET 5.0 UWP/UAP Windows platform.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.netcoreapp
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET Core App 1.1.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.net472
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET Framework 4.7.2.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.net7Windows
member.summary: Target framework moniker for .NET 7.0 Windows platform.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.Test
member.summary: Tests the IsNetCore5UpMoniker method with various target framework monikers.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.IsNetCore5UpMoniker(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a target framework moniker to determine if it is a .NET 5+ style moniker (e.g., net5.0, net7.0-windows).
member.param: Target framework moniker string to parse.
member.returns: Parsed result with framework version and platform TFM, or null if not a .NET 5+ moniker.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.ChangeProjectsTo(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{SunamoDevCode._public.TWithStringDC{System.String}})
member.summary: Changes target framework in all project files from the list to the specified framework moniker.
member.param: Target framework moniker to change to.
List of project items containing content and path.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.ChangeProjectTo(System.String,System.String,SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Results.IsNetCore5UpMonikerResult,System.String)
member.summary: Replace only between TargetFramework
member.param: Target framework moniker to change to.
Path to the csproj file.
Parsed target moniker result.
If the current framework matches this value, skip the change.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.ChangeProjects.ChangeProjectsTo(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Changes target framework in all project files at the specified paths to the given framework moniker.
member.param: Target framework moniker to change to.
List of csproj file paths to update.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5
member.summary: Provides methods for migrating .NET Framework projects to .NET 5+ including reference replacement, platform target changes, and cleanup operations.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of MoveToNet5.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ChangeConvertNonWebPlatformTargetTo(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary:
Pravděpodobně to kurví csproj A1 can be
Tohle asi nemělo příliš smysl. Když jsem to změnil celé v jakémkoliv řešení z AnyCPU na x86 tak jsem měl u plno projektů modrou ikonku. Navíc s tímto nastavením když jsem spustil EveryLine a ač sln bylo nastavené AnyCPu, hned po spuštení že nemůže načíst EveryLine. Když jsem jeho csproj změnil na AnyCPU, chybu začalo hlásit zase u desktop.
A1 can be x86,x64.AnyCPU

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.TypeInfo
member.summary: Type information for the MoveToNet5 class.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ClearUnnecessaryFromNonWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Vyčistí od dočasných souborů z NonWeb
member.param: Logger instance.
Folder path for temporary content (without trailing backslash).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ReplaceUnneedUsings(System.String)
member.summary: Zakomentuje importy se kterými nemůže být převedeno na .net 5

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ReplaceUnneedReferencesInCsprojs(System.String)
member.summary: odstraní reference z c# které
member.param: Path to the csproj file to process.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ReplaceOrRemoveFile(System.Func{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: EN: Replaces or removes XML elements (like PackageReference, Reference) in a .csproj file CZ: Nahrazuje nebo odstraňuje XML elementy (jako PackageReference, Reference) v .csproj souboru
member.param: EN: Optional function to perform additional string replacements on the XML content after the main operation CZ: Volitelná funkce pro provedení dalších textových nahrazení v XML obsahu po hlavní operaci
EN: Name of the XML element to modify (e.g., "Reference", "PackageReference", "ProjectReference") CZ: Název XML elementu k úpravě (např. "Reference", "PackageReference", "ProjectReference")
EN: List of reference Include values to replace or remove (e.g., package names, DLL names) CZ: Seznam hodnot atributu Include k nahrazení nebo odstranění (např. názvy balíčků, DLL)
EN: Full path to the .csproj file to modify CZ: Úplná cesta k .csproj souboru k úpravě

EN: New reference value to replace with (null = remove, non-null = replace). Must be the Include value only. CZ: Nová hodnota reference pro nahrazení (null = odstranit, nenulová = nahradit). Musí být pouze hodnota Include.
member.example: EN: Example - Replace old package with new one: ReplaceOrRemoveFile(null, "PackageReference", new List<string> { "OldPackage" }, @"C:\Project.csproj", "NewPackage") CZ: Příklad - Nahradit starý balíček novým: ReplaceOrRemoveFile(null, "PackageReference", new List<string> { "OldPackage" }, @"C:\Project.csproj", "NewPackage")

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.CommentAssemblyInfoCsFiles(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Don't run, wait whether will be really needed to run it could do more harm than good

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.PlatformTargetToWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary:
Pravděpodobně to kurví csproj A1 can be
Tohle asi nemělo příliš smysl. Když jsem to změnil celé v jakémkoliv řešení z AnyCPU na x86 tak jsem měl u plno projektů modrou ikonku. Navíc text tímto nastavením když jsem spustil EveryLine a ač sln bylo nastavené AnyCPu, hned po spuštení že nemůže načíst EveryLine. Když jsem jeho csproj změnil na AnyCPU, chybu začalo hlásit zase u desktop.
A1 can be x86,x64.AnyCPU
Changes the PlatformTarget for all web projects.
member.param: Logger instance.
Target platform value to set (x86, x64, AnyCPU).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.AddEssentialWebReferencesToAllWebProjects(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Adds essential web references (System.Web, etc.) to all web projects that are missing them.
member.param: Logger instance.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ChangeProjectsToNetStandard(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Changes all SDK-style web projects to target netstandard2.0.
member.param: Logger instance.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.WebProjectsWhichIsNotSdkStyleFindTheirBackup(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Finds backup files for web projects that are not SDK-style and categorizes them.
member.param: Logger instance.
member.returns: Report of backup status for each project.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.DetectFrameworkForWebProjectsOnlySupported(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Detects the .NET framework version for all web projects and groups them by version.
member.param: Logger instance.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ConvertAlLWebNetStandardProjectsToNet48(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Converts all web projects targeting netstandard2.0 to target net4.8.
member.param: Logger instance.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.WebProjectsWhichNotEndWithDotEnd(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Lists web projects whose csproj files do not end with .web.csproj.
member.param: Logger instance.
member.returns: List of non-standard web project paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.DetectFrameworkForWebProjects(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 1 = sdk style, not netstandard2.0 2 = sdk style, netstandard2.0
member.param: Logger instance.
Whether to append a header line to the output.
member.returns: Tuple of (SDK-style web projects, netstandard web projects) with version info.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.FindProjectsWhichIsSdkStyleList(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds all SDK-style projects and returns a formatted list report.
member.param: Logger instance.
Whether to append a header for web projects.
Whether to include web projects.
member.returns: Formatted text report of SDK-style projects.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.FindProjectsWhichIsSdkStyle(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Categorizes projects into SDK style, netstandard, and non-SDK style groups.
member.param: Logger instance.
If true, adds a header label for web SDK style projects.
If true, processes web projects; otherwise processes non-web projects.
member.returns: Result containing three categorized lists of project paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.WebProjectsWhichIsNotSdkStyle(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Gets a newline-separated list of web projects that are not SDK style.
member.param: Logger instance.
member.returns: Newline-separated list of non-SDK style web project paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ReplaceProjectReferenceForWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces project references in web projects to point to the web-specific version.
member.param: Logger instance.
Name of the project to replace references for.
Namespace of the project.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.TableWebAndNonWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Compares web and non-web projects to find which ones exist in both categories. Projects used in both need to stay on netstandard.
member.param: Logger instance.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.RestoreFromBackup(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Restores files from their .old backup copies.
member.param: List of file paths to restore from backup.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ListOfAllWebAndNonWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Gets a formatted list of all web and non-web projects.
member.param: Logger instance.
member.returns: Text output with web and non-web project lists.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.ReplaceUnneedReferencesInCsprojsNotSdKStyle(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Replaces unnecessary references in csproj files that are not SDK style and generates try-convert commands.
member.param: Logger instance.
If true, processes web projects; otherwise non-web projects.
member.returns: Generated try-convert commands for each processed project.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.GenerateTryConvert(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a try-convert CLI command for converting a csproj to .NET 5.
member.param: Path to the csproj file to convert.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.GetAllTargetFrameworks(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Gets all unique TargetFramework values across non-web projects and lists projects with multiple TargetFramework elements.
member.param: Logger instance.
member.returns: Text output with target frameworks grouped by value and list of multi-framework projects.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.Fwss
member.summary: Gets the list of all FoldersWithSolutions instances from the static collection.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.linesFromDontReplaceReferencesIn
member.summary: Cached lines from the "don't replace references in" configuration file.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.WebAndNonWebProjects(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Dont use XmlDocumentsCache

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.MoveToNet5.WebAndNonWebSlns
member.summary: Gets web and non-web solution paths separated into two lists.
member.returns: Tuple where Item1 is web solution paths and Item2 is non-web solution paths.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.Shared
member.summary: Shared utilities for .NET Core migration.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.Shared.Type
member.summary: Type of the Shared class for reflection purposes.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.Shared.ExtractArchive
member.summary: Action to extract archives during migration.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.Shared.PlaformTargetTo(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Changes the PlatformTarget in all csproj files within the given folder.
member.param: Logger instance.
Target platform value to set.
Folder to search for csproj files (non-recursive).
Whether to throw exceptions on errors.
member.returns: Report of files that had issues, or null.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.research.Shared.PlatformTargetTo(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Vyu��v� se v ChangeConvertNonWebPlatformTargetTo(), PlatformTargetTo a PlatformTargetToWeb()
member.param: Target platform value to set (prefix with ! to remove).
List of csproj file paths to process.
Whether to throw exceptions on errors.
member.returns: Report of files that had issues, or null.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Results.IsNetCore5UpMonikerResult
member.summary: Result class for .NET Core 5+ target framework moniker parsing. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/frameworks

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Results.IsNetCore5UpMonikerResult.TargetFramework
member.summary: Gets or sets the target framework (e.g., "net5.0", "net6.0", "net7.0").

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Results.IsNetCore5UpMonikerResult.PlatformTfm
member.summary: Gets or sets the platform-specific target framework moniker (e.g., "-windows", "-android").

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ToNetCore.Results.IsNetCore5UpMonikerResult.ToString
member.summary: Returns the combined target framework and platform TFM as a string.
